title: ilex aquifolium var. balearica
intro: Ilex aquifolium var. balearica, also known as Balearic Holly or Ilex balearica, is a variety of the evergreen holly plant native to the Balearic Islands in the Mediterranean Sea. The plant's leaves and berries have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ilex aquifolium var. balearica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Ilex aquifolium var. balearica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other health problems.
